author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause: reshape() at shape.rs:107-108 has a GPU early-return that calls view_reshape() even when requires_grad is true. view_reshape() always creates a tensor with requires_grad=false, grad_fn=None. The correct path (view_operation with ReshapeBackward) is only used for CPU tensors. Second issue: ReshapeBackward itself uses ensure_cpu/restore_device — GPU→CPU→reshape→CPU→GPU roundtrip for what is purely a shape metadata change. Same lazy pattern as the indexing fix in CL-210. Both the forward and backward need fixing.
